description: Norwegian healthcare API platform providing unified integration to Nordic EHR systems. Single API connects to DIPS, EPJ, and other Nordic health IT systems. Focus on simplifying healthcare integration in Scandinavia.
business_model: B2B - API platform to digital health companies
target_market: Digital health startups, health IT vendors in Nordics
customers: Digital health companies in Norway, Sweden
competitive_advantage: Nordic focus, local market knowledge, simplifying regional integration

varden_fit.rationale: Nordic API platform - DIRECT COMPETITOR/BENCHMARK to what Varden needs
